observation.messy_prompt:
Customer email: Need 10,000 units by day 12. Same ABS as last time. Can you do $0.20/unit?
Operator note: M4 sounded rough this afternoon; might need maintenance.
Inventory: ABS=220kg, Nylon=80kg, PP=40kg.
Machine log: M1 uptime=95%, M2 uptime=90%, M3 uptime=92%, M4 uptime=88%.
HR: operator O2 out sick one day this period.
Current jobs: J123 due day 2 low priority; J128 due day 2 high priority; J130 due day 2 low priority.

intake.scenario_note: Imported 361 SOAR order lines across 180 orders (SKU references and quantities drawn from real RAFS+SOAR+ARMBENCH orders), mapped to plan-2 (pick-pack / outbound wave): 164 source zones, 16 stations, 3 route constraints, 3 job families, layout pressure 0.438.
